# Investment Memo — Northwind Logistics (NWL), Initiation

## Summary

We initiate coverage with an **Overweight** rating and a $58 target. The thesis rests on margin
recovery[^nwl-q4] and a freight-rate rebound[^cass-2025].

## Thesis

We expect operating margin to recover toward 12% as the fleet-renewal capex rolls off. We also lean
on a brokered-channel tailwind[^broker-note] that we have not yet sourced.

## Valuation

Sum-of-the-parts on FY27 estimates (in $M):

<!-- reconcile -->
- Core LTL operating value: 8,200
- Logistics-tech segment: 1,400
- Net cash and equivalents: 600
- Total enterprise-to-equity value: 9,900
<!-- /reconcile -->

## Risks

- **Freight recession:** a demand downturn would stall volume[^cass-2025].
- **Customer concentration:** top five shippers are ~30% of revenue[^nwl-q4].

## Sources

[^nwl-q4]: Northwind Logistics FY2025 Q4 10-K, filed 2026-02-18.
[^cass-2025]: Cass Freight Index, March 2026 release.
[^peer-comp]: Internal peer comparables sheet — never actually cited in the body.
